name: bruhs
description: End-to-end development lifecycle: scaffold projects, plan and build features, create Linear tickets, open and review PRs, clean up after merge, audit codebases. Use when starting a project, implementing a feature, shipping code, addressing PR reviews, merging, or auditing code quality.
